case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.) VS. ANDRES ABARCA ORTIZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.) AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, ANDRES ABARCA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY IRENE GUERRERO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT ANDRES ORTIZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
